creator: michael.osipov@siemens.com
text: I came across this one and noticed that the or one of the maintainers always tests on FreeBSD too and writes why installing TL directly is better than through ports. One thing to note is that there are so many package options during the TL install which this port cannot cover at all. Personally, I am not willing to install 1,7 GB just because minimal does not suite, but another config with 300 MB happily suits my needs.
